evidence.claim: Arriving flights are considered higher priority than departing flights when slot conflicts occur.
evidence.fact: The system gives arrivals priority over departures when competing for the same slot.
evidence.user_story_span: Arriving flights are considered higher priority than departing flights when slot conflicts occur.
evidence.fact_span: The system gives arrivals priority over departures when competing for the same slot.

evidence.claim: There is a slot conflict between an arriving flight and a departing flight.
evidence.fact: The system gives arrivals priority over departures when competing for the same slot.
evidence.fact_span: The system gives arrivals priority over departures when competing for the same slot.

evidence.claim: The arriving flight is assigned the conflicting slot.
evidence.fact: The system gives arrivals priority over departures when competing for the same slot.
evidence.fact_span: The system gives arrivals priority over departures when competing for the same slot.
